name: Crock Pot Venison Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Place venison, onion, garlic, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and seasoning in crock pot.
2. Cook on high for 1 to 2 hours until meat is cooked.
3. Cook bacon and crumble or chop it.
4. Add bacon, ketchup (catsup), molasses, and brown sugar to the crock pot.
5. Turn the crock pot to low and heat for the rest of the day.
6. Serve over rice, potatoes, or toast.
NOTE: Venison can be substituted with any red meat, just cut into 1-inch cubes.
